methodology: Multi-year backfill of EDGAR pipeline disclosures from cached historical 10-K filings. Compounds the Move 2 single-year extraction (extract-pipeline-disclosures.mjs) into a longitudinal pipeline disclosure registry. Coverage: CUBE 10 years, PSA/NSA/EXR/SMA 6 years where applicable, LSI 6 years pre-merger. Every disclosure carries verifiedSource: EDGAR-10K-HIST-<operator>-FY<year> which the Pipeline Confidence chip classifies as VERIFIED.

2018.narrative: December 31, 2018, we had six joint venture development properties under construction located in New York (3), Massachusetts (2), and New Jersey (1) which are expected to be completed by the second quarter of 2020. As of December 31, 2018, we had invested $82.6 million of an expected $160.0 million, related to these six projects. · Store Dispositions.
